authors: Yuehong Cassandra Tai Yu-Ru Lin Bruce A. Desmarais a Center for Social Data Analytics
United Statesb School of Computing and Information
raw_title: Elected officials’ Online Sharing of Misinformation: Institutional and Ideological Checks
title_en: Elected officials’ Online Sharing of Misinformation: Institutional and Ideological Checks
title_zh: 民选官员在线分享错误信息：制度与意识形态制约
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了民选官员在社交媒体上分享错误信息的行为，并分析了制度和意识形态因素如何影响这种行为。研究发现，某些制度安排和意识形态倾向可能会限制或促进官员传播不实信息。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how elected officials share misinformation on social media and analyzes how institutional and ideological factors influence this behavior. The research finds that certain institutional arrangements and ideological tendencies may either constrain or facilitate the spread of false information by officials.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中错误信息传播机制研究，特别关注权力持有者的行为模式及其制约因素。
research_direction_en: Research on misinformation dissemination mechanisms in political communication, with particular focus on behavior patterns of power holders and their constraints.
